hero.title: LeoEd AI:
hero.subtitle: Breaking the traditional “onesizefitsall” teaching model, LeoEd AI is an Adaptive Learning System (ALS)  by using student performance data and study history to select appropriate topics, adjust quiz difficulty and provide focused adjustment. It integrates AIassisted marking with a continuous feedback loop, allowing its recommendations evolve dynamically as new evidence about student understanding is collected over time.

als.title: Adaptive Learning System
als.description: An adaptive learning system is a datadriven instructional platform that continuously analyses each learner’s performance and characteristics to deliver personalised content and feedback in real time.

philosophy.label: CORE PHILOSOPHY
philosophy.title: Learn, Evolve, Optimize (學習、進化、優化)
philosophy.description: LEO stands for “Learn, Evolve, Optimize” (學習、進化、優化). This captures the full learning cycle that the system is designed to support:
philosophy.learnDesc: Students learn new concepts through a personalized sequence of activities.
philosophy.evolveDesc: The platform continually updates its database and learner model based on the student’s performance and progress.
philosophy.optimizeDesc: The system finetunes its recommendations to close the learning gaps and strengthen mastery.

solutions.title: Our Pioneer Products and Go-to-Market Roadmap
solutions.description: LeoEd AI is designed to support high-quality education across different subject areas through phased implementation.

accounting.subject: University Accounting Course
accounting.desc: Best first use case because accounting is rule-based with clear marking rubrics

math.subject: HKDSE Mathematics
math.desc: Strong secondary-school market because Mathematics is a compulsory HKDSE core subject with broad student demand and a structured curriculum.

future.subject: Scale-up path
future.desc: Expand to Gaokao preparation after pilot validation, which is a major long-term market with 13 million registered candidates per year.
